positive: A vibrant, minimalist celestial forest scene. Depict glowing bioluminescent flora (mushrooms, ferns, and delicate vines) emerging from roots into a deep indigo void. The main light source is soft, diffused moonlight filtering through the canopy, casting dramatic shadows and high contrast against the luminous subjects. Incorporate geometric, stylized elements and constellations subtly connecting the plants. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau with a touch of modern vector illustration. Color Palette: Deep indigo, electric teal, emerald green, and subtle gold accents. Composition: Central focus, perfect symmetry, ideal for all-over print on apparel. Line work must be clean, sharp, and scalable. High saturation, high detail, clean silhouette, seamless pattern potential.
negative: blur, noisy, low quality, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, copyright, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, cluttered, graffiti, logo, trademark, celebrity, photorealistic, messy background
